name: Puja Raghav
description: HR Professional with 4+ years across Talent Acquisition, HR Operations, and Employee Relations. People-first approach balancing empathy with operational discipline.

hasOccupation.name: Senior Executive — Human Resources
hasOccupation.description: Leading end-to-end HR for a growing freight business — hiring, onboarding, payroll inputs, policy, employee relations, engagement.
achievements: Closed 50+ roles across freight operations, logistics, and support functions
Rebuilt onboarding into a structured 7-day journey — 30% faster time-to-productivity
Cut employee query resolution time by 40% via single point-of-contact workflow
Ran monthly engagement rituals that lifted participation and internal morale

hasOccupation.name: Talent Acquisition Specialist
hasOccupation.description: Owned full-cycle hiring for a fast-moving EdTech team — sourcing, screening, interviewing, onboarding.
achievements: Closed 60+ EdTech roles across revenue, operations, and academic teams
Screened 200+ candidates and conducted 100+ structured interviews
Onboarded 50+ new hires with a consistent day-one experience
Supported trainer enablement, easing hire-to-contribution ramp

hasOccupation.name: Executive Search Consultant
hasOccupation.description: Partnered with client companies on executive and niche hiring — briefs, headhunting, interview coordination, onboarding follow-up.
achievements: Delivered on 25+ client mandates across diverse corporate roles
Sourced and shortlisted 300+ candidates through targeted headhunting
90% client satisfaction rate across hiring projects

principles: Keep communication open, timely, and clear.
